Actions.Text: REFERRED TO CORPORATIONS, AUTHORITIES AND COMMISSIONS

Title: Authorizes university faculty practice corporations for the practice of occupational therapy
Summary: Authorizes licensed occupational therapists who are members of the faculty of a college or university with an accredited occupational therapy program to create a university faculty practice corporation for occupational therapy students to receive clinical instruction.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the not-for-profit corporation law, in relation to authorizing university faculty practice corporations for the practice of occupational therapy
